item.title: LocalPorts 2.0.2
item.description:
## Fixed
- Fixed fast-fail managed services so the log panel now shows buffered stdout and stderr instead of staying empty.
## Changed
- Added an `Advanced` settings tab with refresh mode, shell environment inheritance, and experimental TCP service options. - Added `Balanced`, `Low Resource`, and `Realtime` refresh profiles to better control background polling. - Added an optional interactive shell environment mode for `nvm`, `asdf`, `fnm`, and similar toolchains. - Added optional experimental TCP/database service support while keeping the default HTTP-first flow unchanged.
